entity.summary: British Virgin Islands-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2015 and continuing through its active global trading platform.
entity.notes: Official company material and an independent exchange profile support the 2015 founding year and continuing operation.

expected.summary: British Virgin Islands-based centralized exchange launched in 2015 and still operating under the LBank brand.
